'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 118''' is the one hundred eighteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 31]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Rebirth of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]
*[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] [[Solo family/Legends|Solo]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]]
*[[:Category:Clothing|Garments and couture]]
